mapper.select: SELECT workboard_id, account_id, title, content, name, reg_date, update_date, passwd, url, workboard_rolename FROM workboard WHERE (is_deleted = 'N' OR is_deleted IS NULL) ORDER BY reg_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workboard (account_id, title, content, name, passwd, url, workboard_rolename, is_deleted, reg_date) VALUES (#{accountId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{author}, #{passwd}, #{url}, #{category}, 'N', NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE workboard SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, passwd = #{passwd}, url = #{url}, workboard_rolename = #{category}, update_date = NOW() WHERE workboard_id = #{workboardId} AND is_deleted = 'N'
UPDATE workboard SET is_deleted = 'Y', update_date = NOW() WHERE workboard_id = #{workboardId}
